title: armeria maritima var. labradorica
intro: Armeria maritima var. labradorica, also known as the dwarf sea pink or Labrador sea pink, is a compact, low-growing perennial plant in the plantain family that is native to the rocky coastlines of Europe and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antimicrobial properties that can help to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
